# side-task

Right side pane that displays a single task's detail alongside the host
conversation. URL shape: `/c/<host>/task/<taskId>` — host conversation
keeps the left split, this pane fills the right via the existing pane
Outlet.

Mirrors `side-conversation`'s shape: read-only-ish task detail with
PaneChrome (title, expand to `/tasks/<taskId>`, close). The post-Create
chip in `active-data/task` opens this pane.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Right side pane that shows a single task's detail alongside the host conversation (read-only-ish; expand to pop out).
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `taskSidePane`
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` `task-side`
